name: feature-loader-c6-spike-3
description: Phase 1 spike — sample 3 of 5. Same procedure as -spike-2; accumulates sample 3.

commands: (() => { const r = window.__canaryGetC6CacheReport(); const atlas = r && r.labels && r.labels['penumbra-render-atlas']; if (!atlas || atlas.samples < 3) throw new Error('atlas samples=' + (atlas && atlas.samples) + ' (expected >=3)'); console.log('[c6-spike-3] sample 3 captured: cold=' + atlas.coldMs + 'ms warmAvg=' + atlas.warmAvgMs + 'ms samples=' + atlas.samples); return 'sample 3 ok'; })()
